title: デビュー戦の後に・レースって最高！

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yoo-hoo! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yoo-hoo! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it was great!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It felt like I shifted into a higher gear than what
I've done in pair running and scrimmage races!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It makes me so happy to think that every time I
race, I'll be able to feel this way! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So, Trainer, now that I've made my debut, what's
our next goal?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So, Trainer, now that I've made my debut, what's
our next goal?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: We might as well aim for the biggest race, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The "biggest race" she's talking about must be the
one to decide the junior champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her ability, she can definitely run there. I
really want to see her take it all the way—making
our next goal...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: That's what I was hoping you'd say!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm absitively posolutely ready for that race! Let's
go for it full throttle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Maruzensky sets her sights on her next
big race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The following day...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All righty, time for some hardcore training!
choice_data_list:
Don't you think you should rest the day after a
race?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
As if! I've set my sights on a G1, so I have to
buckle down!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Maruzensky! Sorry to bother you, but could I
ask you a few questions?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Your fans have been calling you "Hot Rod" since
before your debut! What are your feelings on the
nickname now?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'd love to chat, but I have to get to my
training!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I know! If you can catch me, I'll give you a special
scoop! Ready? Go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
H-how the heck are we supposed to catch a
running Umamusume?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Let's surround her! Come at her from the other
side!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky proceeds to lead the reporters on a
chase, having a blast all the while.
